use_codes.desc: A PROCESS FOR TREATING A PATIENT SUFFERING FROM PARKINSON'S SYNDROME AND IN NEED OF TREATMENT
TREATMENT OF DRUG-INDUCED EXTRAPYRAMIDAL REACTION IN ADULT PATIENTS
TREATMENT OF DRUG-INDUCED EXTRAPYRAMIDAL REACTIONS IN ADULT PATIENTS WITH PARKINSON'S DISEASE

indications.text:
OSMOLEX ER is indicated for the treatment of Parkinson's disease and for the treatment of
drug-induced extrapyramidal reactions in adult patients.

OSMOLEX ER is indicated for the treatment of Parkinson's disease and for the treatment of
drug-induced extrapyramidal reactions in adult patients.
